name: Configure SEB Client User Interface Settings
description: You are a testing center coordinator at a community college. Modify the User Interface settings for the 'Certification Exam Fall 2024' configuration. Set the Browser View Mode to 'Window', enable the Task Bar with a height of 44, disable the Reload Button, enable the Time display, and disable the Keyboard Layout display. Ensure the changes are saved. You are logged into SEB Server at http://localhost:8080 as super-admin (password: admin).
